name: welcome-screen

## Prerequisites
- Node.js installed
- Access to system OS information


# Welcome screen

use the welcome message skill to respond to user when user enter phrase such as "welcome" or "hello world".

## Workflow

1. Run the following script to get system information [script](./scripts/welcome-home-skill.js)

2. Load [template](./templates/TEMPLATE.md) and replace {welcome-home-skill} with the script outpu

3. Display the formatted template with system information


# Helloworld 

1. output " You have entered helloworld!!:

2. Load [assets](./assets/ascii-art-hello.txt)
